Records.authors: Parra-Martinez, Julio, Ruf, Michael S., Zeng, Mao
Records.description: Two-loop H (or 'crossed-box-with-rung') topology embedded in the same 9-index family as the RT double-box, with the H scalar integral $I_H = I_{0,1,1,0,1,1,1,1,1}$. Active propagators are $\rho_2, \rho_3, \rho_5, \rho_6, \rho_7, \rho_8, \rho_9$ ($\rho_1$ and $\rho_4$ are ISPs in this family). Pure basis of 10 even-$|q|$ master integrals (full equal-mass H has 25 MIs). Canonical DE in dlog form with alphabet $\{x, x-1, x+1\}$, three matrices $A_{H,0}, A_{H,+1}, A_{H,-1}$. The 'cut H' prescription on matter propagators is used to obtain $H+xH$ efficiently. Result expanded through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^0)$ for the leading soft order ($q^4$ numerator suppression).
Records.location: Section 4.2.2, Eq. (4.66) embedding into eq:TwoLoopPropsFull, Fig. 9 (props_H). Pure basis: Eqs. (4.68)-(4.77). DE matrices: Eqs. (4.80)-(4.81).
